text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after the tryouts, I'm about to head home when I spot a
frantic—and familiar—student.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're the trainer from yesterday, right?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I haven't been able to find Ryan since classes ended...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
She's always training, so I figured I'd find her on the course or in the
gym...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But she wasn't there! And after that weird race yesterday, I'm starting
to get worried.
choice_data_list: Got it. I'll help you look.
Got it. I'll help you look.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin and I take a quick moment to decide where we should each
look, and then we split up to search for Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After checking the school grounds, I head to the nearby river, parks,
shopping district, and even the station. Just when all hope seems
lost...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Mejiro Ryan about Ines Fujin's search for her and how I offered
to help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha... Aw, man, sorry about that. I'd better apologize to Ines when
I get back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just really wanted to run outside today. I was planning to be back
before anyone started worrying, but I guess that was a bust...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I stopped here to take a break, but then I got caught up in the
scenery... Brings back a lot of memories.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You see, there's a steep hill close to the Mejiro family home. Like steep steep. But if you make it to the top, you get an incredible view.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I was young, we used to play on that hill all the time. We
Mejiro kids would race up it to see who would be the first to see that
breathtaking view.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That includes McQueen too, of course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She's always been a fast one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Out of our whole family, she's probably the one I'm closest to.
I guess we're like childhood friends... Or maybe sisters?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But... McQueen's always been the model Mejiro, and I've been, well...
me. So even though I'm technically older, I never really could act like
a big sister to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She's just... always been amazing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She knows what it means to be a Mejiro, and what sort of standard she's gotta set, both on and off the race course. And then she meets those standards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Her manners are top-notch, and she always looks so elegant. She's
everything the fans of our family want...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I really respect her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She's completely different from me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, thanks... You're a good person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But you don't need to lie. I know I could never be like McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't run with the Mejiro name in mind, and I don't think I ever will.
Even if I could, I wouldn't be able to compete with her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: After all, I just like running. Nothing more... nothing less.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No one would ever look at me and think of me as a distinguished
daughter of a noble lineage. Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She laughs it off, but I can tell that her problems are eating her up
inside. If only I could do something...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dedication to working out has forged her body into a
powerhouse. She's clearly got more talent than she thinks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case... it's clear that she's insecure about her motivation, and
it's been hindering her performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I try to puzzle out a solution to this conundrum, I head back to
school.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so you're doing the 3,200 meter turf race, huh? What should I
do... Oh, maybe the 5,000 meter freestyle race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: There is no such race in the Tracen Meet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly remember that the Tracen Meet, an event where students
can run in a category of their choosing, will happen soon.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Why do you always gotta do the long runs, huh? Why not do the
1,200 meter and make the competition eat your dust?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to win the Tenno Sho, so I obviously need to prepare for
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Tracen Meet attracts all sorts of fans, so I must run in a way that
does not besmirch the Mejiro name!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mejiro McQueen is aiming to win the 3,200 meter turf
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan's problem seems deeply linked to McQueen. Perhaps this
could be a solution.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? You think I should enter the same race as McQueen?
choice_data_list:
Obviously I can't force you, but think about it,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well... It's not that I'm opposed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: How long has it been since she and I ran together anyway?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And why'd you decide to tell me this now?
choice_data_list:
I thought you might learn something from this
race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...All right. No promises, but I'll give it some thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I decide to check on Mejiro Ryan. I don't see her at
the track or in classes, so I decide to check the gym.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew... All done... Nah, let's do one more set.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's you again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uh... I guess so, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey... I, uh... I did it. I signed up for the same race as McQueen. The
3,200 meter turf race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll be honest, though... I don't really get why I decided to do it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm training more than usual, but I think I'm just feeling a little antsy.
Not much more to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm still determined to do it. Feel free to come check out the
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Ryan returns to her workout, pumping out rep after
rep.
